steps.title: Name the unstable output
steps.content: The passage says stored energy can mitigate the effects of solar energy collection caused by unpredictable shifts in cloud cover and haze. The blank needs a phrase for irregular changes in collected solar energy.

steps.title: Reject nonweather meanings
steps.content: A refers to encouragements or rewards, not changes in energy collection. B refers to precise adjustments or measurements. C refers to progress or growth, not unpredictable ups and downs. A word for irregular variations fits. The answer is D.
